branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Structural / loop-class closure repository default fallback

description: Fermion-mass closure: nine dressed Standard-Model fermion masses (e, mu, tau, u, d, s, c, b, t) all close within FACTOR2 of the experimental values via a five-layer dressing cascade (tunnel-overlap quark-isospin splitting; cost-mode lepton dressing; Ward-Z renormalization; ground-state protection; sinc^2 lattice form factor). The charged-lepton ratio m_e/m_mu is lifted from ORDER to PRECISE by the F-05 Georgi-Jarlskog Clebsch construction with texture-null in the (1,1) slot: M_l = D_L M_d^proto D_R with M^proto[0,0] = 0 yields the Georgi-Jarlskog identity (m_e/m_mu)_GJ = (1/9)(m_d/m_s). All values are derived from the System-R coefficients without per-flavor fitting; the cascade is bundled here as a single load-bearing summary file.

nine_dressed_fermion_masses.claim: All nine SM fermion masses within FACTOR2 of experimental values across the canonical lattice variation
nine_dressed_fermion_masses.improvement_history: 5/9 (initial bare-mass dressing) -> 9/9 (after five-layer cascade); biggest single-mass improvement: 57.8 -> 1.87 ratio (top-quark mass dressing)
nine_dressed_fermion_masses.method: five-layer dressing cascade on the bi-unitary spectral Yukawa eigenvalue (SYE) extraction

charged_lepton_ratio_F05_closure.claim: m_e/m_mu PRECISE 3.14% via bi-unitary GJ + texture-null on N=64 canonical-regime extension; regime-dependent (ORDER at N=100)

antusch_2025_cross_check.framing: The framework F-05 GJ texture-null prediction is delivered at the unified Yukawa scale and m_e/m_mu is essentially RG-stable, so the M_Z MS-bar Yukawa ratio (Antusch 2025) is the more appropriate anchor than the pole-mass ratio. Against this anchor, the p5n64 prediction 0.004785 has residual (4.785 - 4.747)/4.747 = 0.80% (PRECISE-loose, vs the older 1.07% PRECISE against pole anchor).

charged_lepton_ratio_F05_closure.earlier_predicted_tier_loose_label: PRECISE-loose (residual 15.5% exceeds the 2.5% strict PRECISE cut; FACTOR2 under strict tier definition)
charged_lepton_ratio_F05_closure.regime_spread_note: p5n64 (N=64) gives 0.004685 (3.14% PRECISE); p5n100 (N=100) gives 0.002114 (56% ORDER). The GJ-textur-null bi-unitary closure is N-dependent and not yet uniform across the canonical-regime ladder.
charged_lepton_ratio_F05_closure.stop_rule_A_explanation: Pure GJ without the texture-null leaves m_e/m_mu on ORDER tier; the texture-null in the (1,1) slot of M^proto is what lifts the prediction to PRECISE on the best-N regime.
charged_lepton_ratio_F05_closure.method: Georgi-Jarlskog Clebsch D = diag(1/sqrt(3), sqrt(3), 1) with texture-null at proto-generation-1 slot M^proto[0,0] = 0; bi-unitary M_l = D_L M_d^proto D_R

m_tau_strict_exact_via_SYE_over_N_gen_pl.claim: m_tau strict-EXACT closure via SYE-Y3b GJ-texture-null divided by structural rational N_gen + 2*gamma = 16/5
m_tau_strict_exact_via_SYE_over_N_gen_pl.structural_origin: 3 = N_gen (3 fermion generations contributing to SYE-Y3b Gram matrix); 2*gamma = twice the Lemma 1 chirality-pair Yukawa-damping transverse weight; alternatively 4*eps_sync^2 = four times the Pure-Sync transverse weight. Both decompositions are first-principles under the framework's lattice-topology rationals (gamma = 1/(N_gen^2 + 1) = 1/10, eps_sync^2 = 1/20).

open_channel.claim: m_tau channel CLOSED at strict-EXACT via SYE-Y3b / (N_gen + 2*gamma) (5/10 regimes EXACT, P4 = 0.001%); supplementary closures: D_Omega^3 generation-power diffusion correction (0.49% strict-EXACT-loose) and SO(10) Yukawa unification + SM RG-running cross-check (4.79% PRECISE-loose).
open_channel.current_status: STRICT-EXACT achieved iter-19 via the bi-unitary SYE-Y3b GJ-texture-null prediction (m_tau_SYE ~ 5.71 GeV across 10 canonical regimes) divided by the parameter-free structural rational N_gen + 2*gamma = 16/5 = 3.20. Residuals: P0=0.156%, P2'=0.262%, P3=0.335%, P4=0.001% (cleanest), P5=0.114% (5 regimes EXACT); P1=1.159%, P7=0.424%, P5N64=0.618%, P5N100=0.819% (4 PRECISE); P6=3.385% (PRECISE-loose). The earlier-quoted 'gfs08 cost-mode-dressed m_tau = 3.05 GeV / FACTOR2 1.72x' situation has been superseded by the SYE-Y3b strict-EXACT closure; Paths A/B/C/D were all dead ends as previously documented, but Path 'SYE / 16/5' (motivated by user's iter-19 hint to revisit spectral-Yukawa-eigenvalue) gives the structurally-derived strict-EXACT mechanism.
audit_outputs: outputs/verify_m_tau_path_A_audit.json (Path A uniform System-R factor, INSUFFICIENT)
outputs/verify_m_tau_paths_B_and_C.json (Paths B and C, both INSUFFICIENT)

outputs/verify_m_tau_path_D_normalization.json (Path D TIME_FEED_NORMALIZATION-corrected on numerical superficially aligns: applying eta_B_transport_GFS04=0.534 from PG-TCP1 to gfs08 cost-dressed m_tau gives 1.623 GeV = FACTOR2 8.67%; HOWEVER follow-up structural audit at iter 15 RETRACTS the path as not-physically-grounded: the GFS04 module in gap_closure_fermion_sector.py specifically computes delta_CP / J_CP / time-reversal-break diagnostics from the phase-charge-quantum, NOT m_tau; the eta_B transport ratio 0.534 is a baryogenesis sphaleron-conversion factor with no derivable structural connection to the charged-lepton Yukawa scale. Path D's 8.67% FACTOR2 number is therefore a numerical coincidence, not a physical closure mechanism)
candidate_lifts: Ma-type two-loop radiative neutrino-mass mechanism analog
Genuine new computation: 5-loop QED+EW+QCD running m_tau(GUT) -> m_tau(pole) requires non-loop-class IR matching layer not bundled in current corpus

summary.framing: Nine fermion masses within FACTOR2 plus the F-05 charged-lepton ratio reaching PRECISE 3.14% at the best-N regime (N=64; regime-dependent, ORDER at N=100) close most of the SM flavor-magnitude question parameter-free; the remaining strict-EXACT m_tau channel is the only fermion-sector observable still listed as open in the wider corpus.
